reference: That is correct; it is just a muscle spasm around the vertebrae. I suggest you take a painkiller with the tablet Myoril four mg twice a day and apply diclofenac ointment twice a day, along with back physiotherapy and shortwave diathermy.
text: That is correct. It is just a muscle spasm around the vertebrae. I suggest you take a painkiller with the tablet meoril for any grains twice a day, and apply diclofenac ointment twice a day, along with back physiotherapy and shortwave diathermy.
